name: Miss Monique
description: '''Alesia Arkusha''' ([[Ukrainian language|Ukrainian]]: ''Алеся Аркуша''; born May 5, 1992), known professionally as '''Miss Monique''', is a Ukrainian [[disc jockey|DJ]], producer and owner of Siona Records. She became known in the electronic music world due to the creation of the YouTube channels "Mind Games" and "MiMo Weekly", but also due to releases on labels such as Tomorrowland Music, Armada, Drumcode and Black Hole Recordings, as well as remixes for David Guetta, Moby and Madonna. She is now into her second season as an Ibiza resident DJ, taking over the Club Room at Hï Ibiza for 2026.
